channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Iranian forces: missiles and drones fired at US targets in Gulf States
item.description: Iranian forces: missiles and drones fired at US targets in Gulf States.

item.title: Apple regains top spot as world’s most valuable company
item.description: Apple regained world’s top spot with $4.88 trillion valuation, overtaking Nvidia which saw a 3.5% market value drop.

item.title: Amazon’s Zoox recalls self-driving vehicles amid emergency response issues
item.description: The recall is the latest development in a series of reports of autonomous vehicles impeding emergency response efforts.

item.title: Eight killed, at least 34 missing after landslide in China’s Chongqing
item.description: Landslide has buried homes and forced more than 1,100 people to evacuate.

item.title: Pakistan cricketer Nawaz sanctioned after cannabis-related positive test
item.description: Nawaz admitted the violation and that the substance had been used in a manner unrelated to sporting performance.

item.title: Israeli attacks on Gaza kill 14, including mourners attending funeral
item.description: Twenty people also injured in strike on funeral procession for Palestinian killed by Israel earlier in the day.

item.title: ‘They took our toilet’: How a settlement has squeezed a Palestinian village
item.description: An illegal Israeli outpost set up next to Umm al-Khair in West Bank, immediately separating villagers from their land.

item.title: Plainclothes ICE agents manhandle man during arrest attempt
item.description: Plainclothes ICE agents manhandle man during arrest attempt at the Las Vegas airport on July 13, 2026.

item.title: Ukraine suffers port attacks as protests persist over defence shake-up
item.description: Russian attacks reportedly kill two Ukrainians aboard foreign vessel in Mykolaiv; two more killed in Kherson and Odesa.

item.title: France vs England – World Cup third-place playoff: Prediction, kickoff
item.description: Losing semifinalists France and England meet in a playoff for the bronze medal, a day before the World Cup final.

item.title: Uganda school bus crash kills 20 children and 1 adult
item.description: Uganda halts school trips after bus crashes returning from waterfall field trip; at least a dozen also injured.

item.title: Burnham confirmed as leader of UK’s governing Labour Party, headed for PM
item.description: Andy Burnham set to become UK prime minister but faces challenges including the cost of living crisis and two wars.

item.title: China’s Xi Jinping launches new AI alliance: What is it?
item.description: Beijing is likely to use the WAICO alliance to influence global AI regulations, analysts say.

item.title: UN urges probe into deaths in Pakistani-administered Kashmir unrest
item.description: Kashmir clashes have killed 31 since June, leading UN rights chief Volker Turk to appeal for calm.

item.title: Satellite images show damage inside Iran’s Bushehr nuclear power plant
item.description: Satellite images reveal strikes between July 7 and 12 on Iran’s largest nuclear power plant.

item.title: Ukraine ‘cuts off’ Crimea from Russia, plunging it into an energy crisis
item.description: Ukraine is ramping up short-, medium- and long-range drone production to bring Russia’s war to a standstill.

item.title: ‘Offer he can’t refuse’: Is Italy’s mafia law breaking crime or families?
item.description: The Italian government can now offer children and wives of mafia bosses a way out of the family business.

item.title: Deadly storm leaves half a million without power in Chile
item.description: Deadly storm leaves half a million without power in Chile

item.title: US seeks extradition of wealthy pro-Palestine donor from Spain
item.description: Washington's pursuit of James 'Fergie' Chambers for supporting 'terror' seen as a warning to other left-leaning donors.

item.title: US marines board commercial tanker in Gulf of Oman
item.description: US marines board commercial tanker in Gulf of Oman

item.title: China slams Trump’s claims over 2020 US election interference
item.description: China has responded to US President Donald Trump’s claims that China interfered in the 2020 US presidential election.

item.title: Church of England backs Palestinian Christians despite backlash
item.description: The Church of England passed a motion to learn about the experiences of Palestinian Christians in the Kairos documents.

item.title: Did China steal 2020 US election data, as Trump claims?
item.description: Trump revived long-debunked theories regarding the 2020 elections in a primetime speech.

item.title: ‘Yuba’ – My dear father
item.description: My father, Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani, believed leadership meant putting Qatar and its people first.

item.title: The Church of England has taken a long-overdue step on Palestine
item.description: By agreeing to hear Palestinian Christians, the Synod has begun to confront its history and responsibilities.
